questions.question: What did Jesus do for his disciples at the Last Supper to demonstrate servant leadership?
How did Jesus identify his betrayer at the supper?
options: He gave him a piece of bread dipped in the dish
questions.answer: He gave him a piece of bread dipped in the dish

questions.question: Peter eagerly agreed when Jesus offered to wash his feet.
A new commandment I give to you, that you _____ one another. Just as I have loved you, you also love one another.
Jesus answered Peter, 'The _____ will not crow until you have denied me three times.'
